zh.Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy: 法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I於1165年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾時，他的父親Simon IV de Montfort14歲，母親Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester12歲。他於1202年與Helvise d'IBELIN在黎巴嫩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1228年1月31日在法國阿奎泰道多福瓦享年63歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利洛福特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I于1165年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾时，他的父亲Simon IV de Montfort14岁，母亲Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester12岁。他于1202年与Helvise d'IBELIN在黎巴嫩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1228年1月31日在法国阿奎泰道多福瓦享年63岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I was born in 1165, in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Simon IV de Montfort, was 14 and his mother, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, was 12. He married Helvise d'IBELIN in 1202, in Lebanon. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 31 January 1228, in Foix, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I est né en 1165, à Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Simon IV de Montfort, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Helvise d'IBELIN en 1202, à Liban. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 31 janvier 1228, à Foix, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I 1165 in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon IV de Montfort 14 und seine Mutter Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester 12. Er hat 1202 in Libanon Helvise d'IBELIN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 31. Januar 1228 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Foix, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I è nato il nel 1165 nel Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Simon IV de Montfort, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Helvise d'IBELIN nel 1202, nel Libano. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 31 gennaio 1228, nel Foix, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES Iが1165年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアモントフォート-スル-リスルで生まれた時，父Simon IV de Montfortは14歳，母Amice De Beaumont Of Leicesterは12歳であった。1202年にレバノンでHelvise d'IBELINと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1228年1月31日にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンフォイックスで63歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスサイント-ルeムイ-ル'hオノーeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I(이)가 1165년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 몽포트-수-리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon IV de Montfort(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1202년 레바논에서 Helvise d'IBELIN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1228년 1월 31일 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 포이스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 세인트-e미-'호노e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I nasceu em 1165, em Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Simon IV de Montfort, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Helvise d'IBELIN em 1202, em Líbano. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1228, em Foix, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I родился в 1165 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-рисл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon IV de Montfort было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Helvise d'IBELIN в 1202 г. в местности Ливан. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 31 января 1228 г. в местности фоикс, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-рeми-л'хонорe, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I nació en 1165, en Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Simon IV de Montfort, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Helvise d'IBELIN en 1202, en Líbano. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 31 de enero de 1228, en Foix, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.
